description: User hovers over the 'I only need accommodation for part of my trip' checkbox.
interaction_target: I only need accommodation for part of my trip
page_title: Travel: Holidays, Cheap Flights, Hotels, Packages & Cars | Expedia
frame_description: Expedia homepage with the Packages tab active and the search form visible.

description: User clicks the 'I only need accommodation for part of my trip' checkbox.
interaction_target: I only need accommodation for part of my trip
page_title: Travel: Holidays, Cheap Flights, Hotels, Packages & Cars | Expedia
frame_description: The user activates the accommodation checkbox.

description: A new form section 'Dates for stay' appears below the checkbox.
frame_description: The UI updates to show additional date selection fields for the accommodation-only portion of the trip.

description: User hovers over the 'I only need accommodation for part of my trip' checkbox again.
interaction_target: I only need accommodation for part of my trip
page_title: Travel: Holidays, Cheap Flights, Hotels, Packages & Cars | Expedia
frame_description: Cursor lingers over the checked box.

description: User clicks the checkbox to uncheck 'I only need accommodation for part of my trip'.
interaction_target: I only need accommodation for part of my trip
page_title: Travel: Holidays, Cheap Flights, Hotels, Packages & Cars | Expedia
frame_description: The user deactivates the accommodation checkbox.

description: The 'Dates for stay' section disappears from the form.
frame_description: The UI reverts to the standard package search form layout.

description: User hovers over the 'Search' button.
page_title: Travel: Holidays, Cheap Flights, Hotels, Packages & Cars | Expedia
frame_description: Cursor moves to the blue search button.

description: User clicks the 'Search' button to initiate the package search.
page_title: Travel: Holidays, Cheap Flights, Hotels, Packages & Cars | Expedia
frame_description: The search button is clicked.

description: Page navigates from the homepage to the search results page.
frame_description: The browser begins loading the search results.

description: A full-screen loading overlay with the Expedia logo and a spinner is displayed.
frame_description: The intermediate loading screen is visible while results are fetched.

description: User scrolls down the search results page to view hotel options.
page_title: London (and vicinity), England, United Kingdom Hotel Search Results | Expedia
frame_description: The user is browsing through the list of available hotel packages in London.

description: User hovers over the result for 'The Zetter Clerkenwell'.
frame_description: Cursor pauses over the first hotel result card.

description: User hovers over the result for 'The Drey - Kensington, Earl's Court'.
frame_description: Cursor moves to the second hotel result card.

description: User continues scrolling down the results page.
frame_description: More hotel results are revealed as the user scrolls.

description: User hovers over the result for 'The Tower Hotel, by Thistle'.
frame_description: Cursor pauses over another hotel card.

description: User scrolls down the left-hand sidebar to view filter options.
frame_description: The user is looking through the filtering sidebar on the left.

description: User hovers over the 'Breakfast included' filter checkbox.
frame_description: Cursor targets the breakfast filter.

description: User selects the 'Breakfast included' filter.
frame_description: The breakfast filter is checked.

description: The search results refresh to show only hotels with breakfast included.
frame_description: The results list updates based on the selected filter.

description: User scrolls further down the filter sidebar.
frame_description: User continues exploring filter options.

description: User hovers over the 'See more' link under the 'Property class' filter section.
frame_description: Cursor pauses over the expansion link for property class.

description: User clicks 'See more' to expand the property class filters.
frame_description: The user expands the filter section.

description: Additional property class filter options (e.g., star ratings) become visible.
frame_description: The sidebar expands to show more filter checkboxes.

description: User scrolls through the expanded filter list and results.
frame_description: General browsing behavior as the user reviews options.

description: User hovers over the 'Any' guest rating option.
frame_description: Cursor moves over the guest rating filter section.

description: User hovers over the 'Wonderful 9+' guest rating option.
frame_description: Cursor moves down the rating options.

description: User hovers over the 'Very good 8+' guest rating option.
frame_description: Cursor continues moving through rating filters.

description: User hovers over the 'Good 7+' guest rating option.
frame_description: Cursor pauses briefly on the 7+ rating.

description: User scrolls back up to the top of the search results.
frame_description: The user returns to the top of the list to make a selection.

description: User clicks on 'The Zetter Clerkenwell' to view the hotel details.
frame_description: The user selects a specific hotel result.

description: Page navigates to the hotel details page for The Zetter Clerkenwell.
frame_description: The browser begins loading the detailed hotel page.

description: A loading screen is displayed while the hotel details page loads.
frame_description: The intermediate loading state before the hotel page is rendered.
